title: Play-Doh Swirlin' Smoothies Toy Blender Playset for Toddlers, Non-Toxic Modelling Compound Set, Crafts for Kids, Creative Play for 3+ Year Olds
features: CREATE FUN PLAY FOOD: Shape pretend fruits, veggies, and more with the Play-Doh tools, then blend them into fun smoothies for hours of interactive play.
IMAGINE DELICIOUS INGREDIENTS: Use the half-moulds and accessories to create imaginative fruits and ice cubes for the perfect play pretend smoothie experience.
DECORATE AND SERVE: Use Play-Doh moulds to make pretend toppings like fruit and whipped cream, then serve in the included cups for hands-on play with friends.
FUN KITCHEN ROLEPLAY: This kitchen playset encourages kids to use their imagination while pretending to make smoothies, offering endless creative play possibilities.
ENTERTAINING FOR TODDLERS: Designed for 3+ year olds, this Play-Doh playset keeps kids entertained and engaged with fun, creative learning toys and vibrant modelling clay.
description: From the manufacturer Play-Doh Swirlin' Smoothies Toy Blender Playset Press and swirl Use the blender cover to press ingredients through and make swirly, multicoloured, make-believe smoothies! Imagine ingredients Create pink avocados, blue bananas or green ice cubes! Let's play Children can pretend to run their own juice bar and share creations with friends. Top it off Yellow and green pretend whipped cream? Don't mind if we do! The video showcases the product in use. The video guides you through product setup. The video compares multiple products.
